calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-24-2005 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-24-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem: Will Chen; Clerk: Linda Espy; not reported

Appearances: Attorney Daniel Piccinini for Plaintiff and attorney Steve Rodriguez from Volunteer Legal Services program for Defendant Beverly Jackson

This cause came on regularly for unlawful detainer settlement conference. The parties conferred with JPT Will Chen in a conference room. The parties reached a settlement and signed a judgment pursuant to stipulation which was filed. Terms and conditions of settlement were not put on the record.

payments.description: FIRST FILING UD COMPLT LESS THAN 2,500
